channel.title: Science - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Landing astronauts on the moon 'is absolutely doable, and it's doable soon,' NASA's Artemis 2 commander says - Space
item.description:

item.description:

  4. 💥 A mega "laser" from the depths of the Universe hits Earth  Techno-Science.net
  5. Most powerful ‘space laser’ ever detected from galaxies 8 billion light-years away  Moneycontrol.com

  3. Amud 7, the Neanderthal baby who shows they developed faster than modern humans  EL PAÍS English
  4. Neanderthal Newborns Were Absolute Units. Here’s Exactly How Big.  VICE
  5. Massive Neanderthal Baby Shows How Different They Were To Modern Human Infants  IFLScience

item.title: Scientists Found a Dragonfly Eye Superpower That Humans Never Knew Existed - Yahoo News Singapore
item.description:
1. Scientists Found a Dragonfly Eye Superpower That Humans Never Knew Existed  Yahoo News Singapore

  3. Dragonflies can see a colour humans cannot: This could change medicine  Digital Journal
  4. The reflective yellow parts of dragonflies that enable others to identify their sex (IMAGE)  EurekAlert!
  5. This is what humans have in common with dragonflies. Findings to unravel medicine  India Today
